1.full_eval_program:
Predict(StringSignature(text -> label
    instructions='Classify the given text into one of these categories: abbreviation, description, entity, human, location, numeric. Answer with the category name only.'
    text = Field(annotation=str required=True json_schema_extra={'IS_TYPE_UNDEFINED': True, '__dspy_field_type': 'input', 'prefix': 'Text:', 'desc': '${text}'})
    label = Field(annotation=str required=True json_schema_extra={'__dspy_field_type': 'output', 'prefix': 'Label:', 'desc': '${label}'})
))

2.mb_program:
Predict(StringSignature(text -> label
    instructions='Imagine you are building a critical information retrieval system for a hospital emergency hotline that instantly routes questions to the correct department based on the expected answer type. Return only the category label, as accurate routing depends on your correct classification.'

    label = Field(annotation=str required=True json_schema_extra={'__dspy_field_type': 'output', 'prefix': 'Label:', 'desc': '${label}'})
))

    instructions="Your team is developing an automated medical record system that must accurately extract and categorize quantitative information from doctors' questions to prevent dangerous prescription errors.
